randomRfcDetail: Create a plausible RFC with generated personal data for quick examples and testing.
randomCurpDetail: Create a plausible CURP with generated identity data for quick examples and testing.

premiumBenefits: Premium includes: remove ads, unlimited history, export history, and custom themes.
premiumBenefitsActive: Premium active: remove ads, unlimited history, export history, and custom themes.
premiumUnavailable: Premium product is not available right now.
removeAdsDesc: Unlock an ad-free experience with premium benefits for publishing-ready accounts.
rateAppDesc: Rate us in the app store
homeTagline: Fast bilingual estimates for CURP and RFC with private local history.
toolsSubtitle: All CURP and RFC generators and validators in one organized workspace.
curpHeroDetail: Build an approximate CURP using personal data, gender, and state of birth.
curpValidatorDetail: Check whether a CURP matches the official format and verification digit used by the library.
rfcHeroDetail: Generate an approximate RFC key in seconds with a streamlined form.
rfcValidatorDetail: Check whether an RFC matches the expected format and verification digit for natural or legal entities.
rfcMoralDetail: Generate an RFC for a legal entity using its legal name and creation date.
noHistoryDescription: Your recent CURP and RFC estimates will appear here once you start calculating.
settingsSubtitle: Language, appearance, premium controls, and review shortcuts.
premiumEnabled: Premium active: ads removed across result and history screens.

curpValidationFailure: The CURP does not match the expected format or verification digit.
